meaning: n.[希神]珀尔塞福涅(宙斯之女,被冥王劫持娶作冥后)
examples: Persephone gave her the beauty box but warned her not to open it.
One day, Persephone was picking flowers in the valley with her companions.
She went right to Persephone 's castle and requested a little of her beauty.
